description: The agent repeats the same failing action every step, making no state change, until the step cap or budget is exhausted.
body: Failure mode: a tool keeps returning the same error and the agent keeps re-issuing the identical call, so it burns its entire step budget without progress. Detection signals: no signature comparison across steps; identical action/result repeated; the loop only stops at the step cap; a repeating-error scenario has no test. Do not assume the step cap alone protects against stalls. Safer fallback: track a signature of each step's action and result, detect repetition across a window, and halt or change strategy on no progress, with a test that a repeated error breaks the loop early.
